PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?kitManufacturer ?kitManufacturerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q309095 p:P5995 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P5995 ?kitManufacturer .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER(?startDate >= "2012-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?endDate
  }
  ?kitManufacturer rdfs:label ?kitManufacturerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?kitManufacturerLabel) = "en")
}
